creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text: It doesn't but we have around 280 ports that uses it and about ~30 that uses on the fly generated archives using Gitlab instances/services. It would be nice if we could convert all these to USE_GITLAB and do a simple line change once https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=248967 is fixed rather than doing more detective work later on.
